LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SCHROEDER'S CAFE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT SCHROEDER'S CAFE IS AN APPROPRIATE PARTY TO THIS ACTION BECAUSE ITS RIGHTS AND INTEREST IN THE SUBJECT PREMISES MAY BE AFFECTED BY THE RELIEF SOUGHT HEREIN. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER MIRRORING THE COURT'S RULING AND EMAIL TO COURT- COPYING OPPOSING COUNSEL- FOR SIGNATURE). JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THE FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC AND RICK HOLMAN'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT [CCP 425.16] IS DENIED. ALTHOUGH THE ACTION ARISES FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY, PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN THE REQUISITE MINIMAL MERIT SUFFICIENT TO DEFEAT THE MOTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER MIRRORING THE COURT'S RULING AND EMAIL TO COURT - COPYING OPPOSING COUNSEL - FOR SIGNATURE). JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THE FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC AND RICK HOLMAN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE FIRST, SECOND, FOURTH AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE NOT RES JUDICATA OF THE SMALL CLAIMS ACTION. THERE ARE SUFFICIENT ALLEGATIONS PERTAINING TO DEFENDANT HOLMAN AS AN INDIVIDUAL TO MAINTAIN THE CAUSES OF ACTION ALLEGED AGAINST HIM. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER MIRRORING THE COURT'S RULING AND EMAIL TO COURT - COPYING OPPOSING COUNSEL - FOR SIGNATURE). JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS THE FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC AND RICK HOLMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. THE REFERENCES IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEYS ARE NEITHER WHOLLY IRRELEVANT NOR DEMONSTRABLY FALSE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER MIRRORING THE COURT'S RULING AND EMAIL TO COURT - COPYING OPPOSING COUNSEL - FOR SIGNATURE). JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. L. Ryan Peter (415-781-4400) appearing for Defendant and moving party/ Atty. Kevin Rooney (415-391-7100) appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

Argued. -Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS THE FRONT STREET BUILDING and RICK HOLMANS' DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED,(1) cause of action for breach of contract sufficiently alleges tenant's performance under the contract in 39; (2) cause of action for constructive eviction is available in commercial tenancies. Authorities cited by the defendant, Frittelli and Lee, do not address tort-based claims. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and approved as to form. Judge Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Rooney, Esq. of Browne George Ross, (415-391-7100), for Telmate, LLC, Plaintiff and moving party / Scott McClure, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois, (415-438-6647), for The Front Street Building, Defendant and opposing party

ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to File Second Amended Complaint is GRANTED. Defendant may appear ex-parte with requests to shorten response and notice time for necessary discovery in this case. Defendant must show by declaration of counsel that such specific discovery is necessary in order to defend against constructive eviction cause of action. Order is signed in open court. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: KEVIN ROONEY, ESQ., PINNACLE LAW GROUP, 415.394-5700, FOR PLAINTIFF TELMATE, LLC.
DWIGHT DONOVAN, ESQ., MBV LAW, 415.433.6563 AND SCOTT MCCLURE, ESQ., LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH, 415.362.2580, FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS DEFENDANT RICK HOLMAN AND FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC.

COURT MAKES DISCLOSURE ON THE RECORD BEFORE BEGINNING TODAY'S HEARING.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS THE FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC and RICK HOLMAN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. The first, second, fourth and fifth causes of action are not res judicata of the small claims action. There are sufficient allegations pertaining to Defendant Holman as an individual to maintain the causes of action alleged against him. (PREVAILING PARTY to prepare a form of order mirroring the court's ruling and email to court- copying opposing counsel- for signature). Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: KEVIN ROONEY, ESQ., PINNACLE LAW GROUP, 415.394-5700, FOR PLAINTIFF TELMATE, LLC.
DWIGHT DONOVAN, ESQ., MBV LAW, 415.433.6563 AND SCOTT MCCLURE, ESQ., LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH, 415.362.2580, FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS DEFENDANT RICK HOLMAN AND FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC.

COURT MAKES DISCLOSURE ON THE RECORD BEFORE BEGINNING TODAY'S HEARING.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS THE FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC and RICK HOLMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied. The references in the First Amended Complaint to Defendant's attorneys are neither wholly irrelevant nor demonstrably false. (PREVAILING PARTY to prepare a form of order mirroring the court's ruling and email to court- copying opposing counsel- for signature). Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Notice Of Special Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint [Ccp 425.16]
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: KEVIN ROONEY, ESQ., PINNACLE LAW GROUP, 415.394-5700, FOR PLAINTIFF TELMATE, LLC.
DWIGHT DONOVAN, ESQ., MBV LAW, 415.433.6563 AND SCOTT MCCLURE, ESQ., LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH, 415.362.2580, FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS DEFENDANT RICK HOLMAN AND FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC.

COURT MAKES DISCLOSURE ON THE RECORD BEFORE BEGINNING TODAY'S HEARING.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS THE FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC and RICK HOLMAN'S Special Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint [CCP 425.16] is denied. Although the action arises from protected activity, Plaintiff has shown the requisite minimal merit sufficient to defeat the motion.

(PREVAILING PARTY to prepare a form of order mirroring the court's ruling and email to court- copying opposing counsel- for signature). Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: KEVIN ROONEY, ESQ., PINNACLE LAW GROUP, 415.394-5700, FOR PLAINTIFF TELMATE, LLC.
DWIGHT DONOVAN, ESQ., MBV LAW, 415.433.6563 AND SCOTT MCCLURE, ESQ., LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH, 415.362.2580, FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS DEFENDANT RICK HOLMAN AND FRONT STREET BUILDING, LLC.

COURT MAKES DISCLOSURE ON THE RECORD BEFORE BEGINNING TODAY'S HEARING.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SCHROEDER'S CAFE'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled. Defendant Schroeder's Cafe is an appropriate party to this action because its rights and interest in the subject premises may be affected by the relief sought herein. (PREVAILING PARTY to prepare a form of order mirroring the court's ruling and email to court- copying opposing counsel- for signature).
